title: acer × neglectum var. zoeschense
intro: Acer × neglectum var. zoeschense, also known as Acer × neglectum 'Zoeschense', is a rare hybrid maple tree, resulting from the cross between Acer pseudoplatanus (sycamore maple) and Acer platanoides (Norway maple). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where its extracts have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Acer × neglectum var. zoeschense include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in managing conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
